title: lindmania oliva-estevae
intro: Lindmania oliva-estevae, also known as the Lindmania, is a species of air plant, specifically a type of bromeliad that belongs to the family Bromeliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lindmania oliva-estevae include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and improving respiratory function. Herbal preparations of Lindmania oliva-estevae often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be taken orally or used topically to administer the plant's medicinal properties.
